doc_title: NUREG-2173, Rev. 1 - Tribal Protocol Manual - July 2018.

steps.text: Recognize the Federal Trust Relationship With and Uphold Its Trust Responsibility to Indian Tribes.
Engage in Timely Consultation with Indian Tribes.
Conduct meaningful and timely discussions between the NRC and Tribal governments on regulatory actions.
Establish early communications when regulatory actions have Tribal implications.
Coordinate with other Federal agencies during Tribal consultation.

preconditions.text: Before establishing consultation, the NRC staff should understand the objectives of the consultation.
If a Tribe has not assumed responsibilities of a State Historic Preservation Officer, Federal agency must consult with the Tribe.
